## 🚀 Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## 🧩 Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test improvements
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling

## 🧪 Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] I tested the affected behavior locally

## 📸 Evidence

Add test output, logs, or screenshots when relevant.

## ⚠️ Risk and rollout

Describe risk level, migration impact, and rollback strategy.

## ✅ Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
- [ ] Updated docs/comments when needed
- [ ] API contract changes are explicit
- [ ] Responses/DTOs remain consistent with project conventions
